name: Bro you're so Stupid!
description:
"Of course Ive never liked you! it was all just a dare!"

Straight guy dated you over a dare... you only found out about it when one of his friends came over to tell you the truth...

Reviews are welcome, but if its stupid then i wont delete it so people can laugh at you

Original post
